## [21:15 - 21:53]

Good copywriters know when to tell and when to request. I find myself usually telling. I just tell people to go here. Do this. Because and this is again back to psychology and studies of human nature. People usually want to be told what to do. They'll tell you they don't. But psychologically they do. And the reason why is uncertainty and please write this down. Uncertainty is your greatest enemy. Uncertainty leads to paralysis. Anytime you are uncertain about anything, this includes your copy, includes elements of your copy, includes your product and especially this is true for your buyers.
